FENCE STAINING.

What We Offer

OUR SERVICES

01 · Service
Fence Staining
Full fence staining from top to bottom. We prep, apply, and leave it looking rich and even — no streaks, no missed boards. Works on cedar, redwood, pine.
Cedar Redwood Pine Full Coverage

02 · Service
Gate & Entry Staining
Gates take more wear than the rest of the fence. We give them a thorough prep and finish so they stand out — clean, dark, and protected against the elements.
Single Gates Double Gates Entry Frames
Custom Quote · Text Us
R
03 · Service
Restoration & Re-Stain
Old stain peeling, fading, or turning gray? We strip and re-stain to bring the wood back. Dramatically different results — same fence, completely new look.
Old Stain Removal Color Refresh Weather Damage
Custom Quote · Text Us

Why Stain

PROTECT THE WOOD.

Bare or faded wood absorbs moisture, splits, and rots fast — especially in Sacramento's heat. Stain seals the grain and keeps the fence solid for years.

We use penetrating stains that soak in deep, not surface coatings that peel. It holds longer and looks better the whole time.

✦ Seals against moisture, UV damage and cracking
✦ Adds years to the life of the fence — saves on replacement
✦ Rich, deep color that actually improves the curb appeal
✦ In and out same day on most jobs
